news.t: ProShares Launches ION, The First ETF to Invest Only in Companies Mining Battery Metals
ProShares launches ETF investing in miners of metals for batteries powering electric vehicles

holdings.infoBox: ION is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are Liontown stock at 4.50%, PLS Group at 4.40%, Sigma Lithium at 4.11%, IGO Limited at 3.90%, and CHENGXIN LITHIUM GROUP CO-A at 3.49%.

overview.description: The ProShares S&P Global Core Battery Metals ETF (ION) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Global Core Battery Metals index. The fund tracks an index of companies from around the world that are engaged in the mining of base metals used to produce batteries. ION was launched on Nov 29, 2022 and is issued by ProShares.
infoTable: S&P Global Core Battery Metals Index
